3322380.name: Blend_IT
3322380.description:
Blend_It is a minimalist, comfortable puzzle game.

Your goal is to combine the simple figures provided to fit the images presented.

a puzzle game with a new mechanism

Blend_It is a game that uses only black and white colors.

White has a value of 1, and black has a value of 0.

You can edit the combination by selecting shapes, selecting multiplication, addition, and subtraction operations.

Think of colors as numbers, use operators, layering shapes to create new shapes!

a constant challenge

There are currently a total of 100 stages for Blend_It. (We're still updating it.)

If you have completed the 100th stage, the infinite mode created by AI will be lifted.

Experience new stages constantly through Infinite Mode!
